daily.today_energy: Venus is doing something delicious in your corner of the sky. You're naturally magnetic rn—people are drawn to your vibe. Lean into conversations that matter and let your authentic self shine through without overthinking it.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled or solo, there's a gentle shift toward deeper connection happening. If you've been holding back from someone, today feels like it's asking you to be a little more honest. Your vulnerability is actually your superpower.
daily.career: Your creative problem-solving is peaking. This is the energy to pitch that idea you've been sitting on or reach out to someone who could open a door. Trust your instincts—they're unusually sharp today.
daily.health: Your body's asking for balance. Move in ways that feel good rather than punishing yourself—a walk, some stretching, dancing in your room counts. Hydrate generously and listen when you need rest.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is all about reclaiming your peace, Libra. Venus is whispering that it's time to stop people-pleasing and start honoring what actually feels good to you. Trust the shift.
weekly.love: Someone's been waiting for you to make a move, but honestly? The real love story this week is between you and your own boundaries. Setting them isn't cold, it's magnetic.
weekly.career: Your ideas are hitting different right now. Don't dim them down in meetings—the universe is backing your vision hard. Speak up with conviction and watch who actually listens.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for slower mornings and deeper breaths. This week is less about grinding and more about tuning in. What does your nervous system actually need right now?
